The '''Preparation Center''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] facility on [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]] where the crew of the ''[[Outbound Flight]]'' trained<ref name="Outbound Flight" /> for two [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to the launch of the [[Outbound Flight Project|Project]] in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]].<ref name="OF Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] to [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]].</ref> It was located several [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] from the [[Yavvitiri Spaceport]].<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Preparation Center first appeared in [[Timothy Zahn]]'s [[2006]] novel [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']].<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

==Appearances==
*[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book and [[Outbound Flight (abridged audiobook)| abridged audiobook]]}}
*[[Outbound Flight (abridged audiobook)|''Outbound Flight'' abridged audiobook]]
